changes.diff:
@@ -38,2 +38,3 @@
         self._meta_ordering = None
+        self._combinator_ordering_select = []
 
@@ -358,3 +359,16 @@
                 else:
-                    raise DatabaseError('ORDER BY term does not match any column in the result set.')
+                    # When the component queries don't define their own
+                    # select lists, the ordering expression can be selected
+                    # implicitly in every component. Keep it out of the
+                    # queryset's public result columns by adding it only to
+                    # the compiler's select list.
+                    if any(query.has_select_fields for query in self.query.combined_queries):
+                        raise DatabaseError('ORDER BY term does not match any column in the result set.')
+                    col_alias = '__orderbycol%d' % (len(self.select) + 1)
+                    self._combinator_ordering_select.append((col_alias, src))
+                    sql, params = self.compile(src, select_format=True)
+                    self.select.append((src, (sql, params), col_alias))
+                    resolved.set_source_expressions([
+                        RawSQL('%d' % len(self.select), ()),
+                    ])
             sql, params = self.compile(resolved)
@@ -434,2 +448,6 @@
                     ))
+                if self._combinator_ordering_select:
+                    compiler.query = compiler.query.clone()
+                    for alias, expression in self._combinator_ordering_select:
+                        compiler.query.add_annotation(expression, alias)
                 part_sql, part_args = compiler.as_sql()
